title: My Wife's Romance
overview: When Paul dies, he leaves his wife Eve with a mountain of debt.  As the police begin their investigation into Paul’s death, Eve is supported by a lawyer named Chollet, a friend of her husband who generously helps her to clear the debts she has inherited.  Eve and Chollet become close, perhaps too close, and their intimacy soon begins to arouse the suspicions of the police..

trailers.title: 「若き人妻の秘密」予告
